name: Lemon Meringue Pie (Kingsford)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the corn starch, sugar, and salt in a double boiler at the top of a saucepan.
2. Slowly stir in the water while cooking over boiling water, stirring constantly.
3. Cook until thick enough to mound slightly when dropped from a spoon. Cover and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Beat the egg yolks and sugar together. Blend some hot mixture into the yolks.
5. Stir all into the remaining hot mixture and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Remove from boiling water and gently stir in the margarine, lemon rind, and lemon juice.
7. Cool to room temperature and spread over the cooled filling.
8. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
9. Continue beating until stiff peaks form when the beater is raised.
10. Spread the meringue around the edge of the filling, touching the crust all around, then fill in the center.
11. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the meringue is lightly browned.
